text_block_list.name: Hishi Akebono
text_block_list.text:
And... after a few finishing touches, your
extra-large buono cake is all finished! ♪

text_block_list.name: Eishin Flash
text_block_list.text:
Thank you for teaching me such a precious
recipe, Akebono.

text_block_list.name: Eishin Flash
text_block_list.text:
By the way, the recipe says three eggs, but how
many grams would that be?

text_block_list.name: Eishin Flash
text_block_list.text:
I am assuming you mean chicken eggs, but they
can vary in size by up to six grams...

text_block_list.name: Hishi Akebono
text_block_list.text:
Wow, really?! Unfortunately, this recipe wasn't
written using grams, so...

text_block_list.name: Eishin Flash
text_block_list.text:
Understood. I will experiment with different sized
eggs on my own.

text_block_list.name: Hishi Akebono
text_block_list.text:
Oh, oh! But the most important part of this recipe
is to add lots and looots of love! ♪

text_block_list.name: Eishin Flash
text_block_list.text: How many grams of love should I add?
